data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution expiry window support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Attribution expiry window support', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for this support, yet the prior steps do not include any evidence related to its implementation or validation. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: Attribution expiry window support is not validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of attribution expiry window support.
